name: homebridge-raumfeld
description: Control Teufel Raumfeld multiroom speakers from Apple HomeKit, with AirPlay streaming from iOS.
//dependencies-note: SOAP is hand-rolled over global fetch (see src/raumfeldClient.ts); /getZones XML is parsed with fast-xml-parser. For a production AirPlay path, add an airtunes2 / shairport-sync bridge where src/airplayBridge.ts spawns the receiver.
